index.hipaaTooltipBody: The Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA) sets national standards for protecting sensitive patient health information. Your scan data is encrypted, never sold, and handled in full compliance with HIPAA regulations.
index.heroSubtitle: Heart rate, blood pressure, HRV and 30+ clinical vitals — measured from a 30-second face scan. Then chat with Cira about the results.

heroChat.m5: Sounds like an upper respiratory infection. Let me run a quick assessment...
heroChat.m7: Based on your symptoms, rest and fluids should help. I'll flag if anything needs urgent care 💙

intelligence.p1: Cira is trained on hundreds of millions of clinical cases, peer-reviewed medical studies, and real diagnostic data from around the world.
intelligence.p2: When you describe your symptoms — she doesn't search for keywords. She thinks through every possible combination. Every diagnostic pathway. Every risk factor. Every contraindication.
intelligence.p3: Then she adds your real vitals from the scan.
intelligence.p4Part1: And she tells you what the combination means. Not a list of possibilities.
intelligence.p4Bold: A specific assessment. Backed by real data.
intelligence.c1: Trained on peer-reviewed medical literature and hundreds of millions of clinical cases
intelligence.c2: Multiple diagnostic pathways evaluated simultaneously — not sequential guessing
intelligence.c3: Cross-references your symptoms with your real clinical vitals from the face scan
intelligence.c4: Produces structured health assessments that mirror real clinical consultations
intelligence.exampleQuote:
"Your blood pressure is 138/88 and your heart rate is 102. Combined with the chest tightness you're describing and your HRV drop of 22% — this pattern is consistent with acute cardiovascular stress.

This is not something to sleep on.

Go to a clinic or emergency room within the next two hours. I've prepared a complete summary of everything I found for your doctor."
intelligence.disclaimer1: Cira does not replace professional medical advice.
intelligence.disclaimer2: All assessments should be reviewed with a qualified physician.

shen.title1: The scan is not an estimate.
shen.lead: The face scan powering Cira uses clinically validated health monitoring technology with signal fusion — beat-by-beat blending of rPPG and rBCG signals, selecting the strongest data from each source in real time. The result: consistent accuracy across all skin tones, all lighting conditions, and all devices.
shen.stat2: BP accuracy gain in elevated range
shen.f1Body: Two parallel signals — rPPG (skin colour changes from blood flow) and rBCG (micro-movements from heartbeats) — are processed simultaneously. The SDK selects the strongest beats from whichever source is best at any given moment.
shen.f2Body: A neural network builds a 3D face mask and realigns it throughout the scan. A dual-tracker architecture keeps the measurement running even if you shift position, tilt your head, or adjust your grip.
shen.f3Body: Before the scan: coaching on positioning and lighting. During: live quality feedback. After: results with a quality rating and tips for improvement. A 7-component Environmental Quality Index ensures clinical rigour.
shen.f4Body: Your camera feed is never recorded, transmitted, or stored. Everything runs locally on your phone. Nothing leaves your device. Ever.
shen.accuracySub: Blood pressure accuracy improved 20% in the elevated range (140–170 mmHg). Body composition accuracy improved 45% with retrained models on millions of samples.
shen.trustedBy: Trusted by 80+ healthcare partners in 33 countries
shen.quote: "This technology helped us become the #1 blood pressure app in the US, UK, Canada and Australia."
shen.footnote: Undergoing EU Medical Device Regulation certification. Strict precision mode suppresses results when quality falls below clinical threshold. All processing on your device. Nothing sent to any server. Ever.

scan.title: See what your body is actually saying.
scan.body:
Cira uses clinically validated camera technology to read 30+ vital signs from your face in 30 seconds.

Blood pressure. Heart rate. HRV.
Stress index. Breathing rate.
No hardware. No wearables.
Just your camera.
scan.privacy: All processing on your device. Nothing stored without your permission.
scan.realCaption1: What you see vs what the AI reads beneath your skin
scan.realCaption2: rPPG analyzes subtle color changes in your skin caused by blood flow. rBCG detects micro-movements generated by your heartbeat. Both running simultaneously. All from your camera.
scan.markersTitle: 30+ health markers. From your face. In 30 seconds.
scan.vitalSignsSub: Measured entirely from the face scan
scan.indicesSub: Based on scan and user data
scan.risksSub: Based on scan and user data
scan.validated: Clinically validated · Undergoing EU Medical Device Regulation certification

founder.name: Jean-Marc
founder.quote:
"I built Cira because I have high blood pressure and high cholesterol. Every time I see my doctor I arrived with nothing.

Last week my scan showed pulse 102 and BP 135/86. For the first time — I had something real to show my doctor."

about.label: About us
about.title: Your AI health nurse — anytime, anywhere.
about.lead: askainurse.com is a clinical-grade AI health platform that combines a conversational AI nurse with a 60-second face scan. We help you understand your vitals, document symptoms, and walk into every doctor's appointment prepared — all from your phone.
about.step1Body: Chat with our AI nurse 24/7 in 16+ languages. Describe your symptoms, ask health questions, get clinically grounded guidance.
about.step2Body: A 60-second face scan measures heart rate, blood pressure, HRV, stress, breathing, and 10+ other vitals — using your camera only.
about.step3Body: Receive a downloadable clinical PDF with your vitals, AI assessment, and recommendations — ready to share with your doctor.
about.how1Body: — no app download. Works in your browser on any phone or laptop.
about.how2Body: — our clinically validated rPPG technology (the same signal-fusion approach used in hospital studies) reads your vitals from subtle skin-color changes captured by your camera. 100% on-device — no video leaves your phone.
about.how3Body: — Cira analyzes your vitals alongside your symptoms, asks the right follow-up questions, and provides a structured clinical assessment.
about.how4Body: — every consultation generates a PDF report you can save, track over time, or share with a licensed physician through our doctor network.
about.disclaimer: Cira is an AI health nurse — not a replacement for a licensed doctor. For emergencies, always call your local emergency services.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently asked questions.
faq.q1: Is Cira a replacement for my doctor?
faq.a1: No. Cira is an AI health nurse, trained on clinical protocols. She helps you understand your symptoms, track your vitals, and arrive prepared at your doctor's office — but she never replaces professional medical advice.
faq.q2: How accurate is the face scan?
faq.a2: Cira uses the Shen AI SDK, a clinically validated rPPG technology that measures heart rate, blood pressure, breathing rate, and 15+ other vitals from a 60-second face scan. It is used in regulated health settings worldwide.
faq.a3: Yes. The face scan is processed 100% on-device — your video never leaves your phone. Your conversations and vitals are encrypted and stored securely. We never sell your data.
faq.a4: You can chat with Cira and run one face scan completely free, no signup required. Paid plans unlock unlimited scans, conversation history, and detailed clinical reports.
faq.a5: Cira speaks 16+ languages including English, Spanish, French, Mandarin, Arabic, Hindi, Portuguese, German, Japanese, and more.
faq.q6: Can I see a real doctor through Cira?
faq.a6: Yes. After your assessment, you can book a licensed physician across specialties including GP, Pediatrics, Psychology, Cardiology, and more — available globally, 24/7.

ourStory.label: Why Cira exists
ourStory.title:
I built Cira
because I have a problem.
ourStory.body:
I have high blood pressure.
I have high cholesterol.
I've been managing both for years.

Every few months I sit down with my doctor.
He asks how I've been.
I try to remember.

Did my pressure spike last week?
Was it the stress or the food?
I don't know.
I have no data.
I have no record.
Just my memory — which is unreliable
when it matters most.

He takes one reading in the office.
That one number becomes the basis
for decisions about my health.

Meanwhile — between appointments —
nobody is watching.

Last week I scanned myself with Cira.

Pulse: 102.
Blood pressure: 135/86.

Elevated. Not an emergency.
But something my doctor should know about.
Something that would have disappeared
into my memory before Cira existed.

Now it's saved. Documented. Ready to show him.

That's why I built this.
Not for the technology.
Not for the business.

For that moment.

The moment when you finally arrive
at your doctor's office
with something real in your hands.
ourStory.scanCaption:
My real scan. My real numbers.
March 2026.
ourStory.ciraQuote:
"Your blood pressure is elevated at 135/86
and your pulse is 102.

Tell me — how long have you
been feeling this way?"
ourStory.wallTitle:
This wall belongs
to our users.
ourStory.wallBody:
When people use Cira and want to share
what happened — their story lives here.

No invented testimonials.
No marketing copy.
Just real people.
Real moments.
Real health.

The first story is mine.
The rest will be yours.
ourStory.footer1: Cira does not replace professional medical advice.

free: Chat with Cira, your AI nurse
family: Ideal for parents managing kids' and elders' health

faqs.q: Do I need to sign up to try it?
faqs.a: No. You can chat with Cira and run one face scan completely free — no account, no credit card, no commitment.
Yes. Cancel in one click from your account. No emails, no phone calls, no retention pressure.
Yes — a 7-day money-back guarantee on Premium and Family plans. If Cira isn't right for you, we'll refund you in full.

faqs.q: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.a: All major credit cards, debit cards, Apple Pay and Google Pay. Local payment methods are added in select markets.

faqs.q: Will my price ever go up?
faqs.a: Your price is locked in for as long as your subscription stays active. We honor the rate you signed up with.
Yes. Face scans are processed 100% on-device — your video never leaves your phone. Your conversations and vitals are encrypted and never sold.

faqs.q: Is this a replacement for a doctor?
faqs.a: No. Cira is an AI nurse who helps you understand your symptoms and decide your next step. She does not replace professional medical advice.

faqs.q: Can I switch between Premium and Family?
faqs.a: Yes — upgrade, downgrade or switch plans at any time from your account settings.

technology.heroTitle: Your phone camera reads clinical vitals. Independently validated.

realDoctors.heroSubtitle: Cira gives you private AI nurse guidance first. When your full assessment suggests it, you can step straight into real medical care via Air Doctor's network of ~20,000 licensed doctors across ~180 countries — telehealth or in-person.
realDoctors.whyTitle: More than just an AI chat
realDoctors.whySubtitle: Many people assume AskAinurse is "just AI." It isn't. The AI nurse is designed to be the first step — and when needed, you move on to real doctors instead of being left alone with a summary.
realDoctors.step1Title: Start with a full Cira assessment

realDoctors.finalTitle: From chat and scan to doctors in 180 countries.
realDoctors.finalSubtitle: Start with Cira. If real care is the right next step, you'll know — and Air Doctor will be one tap away.
realDoctors.footerLegal: AskAinurse / Cira provides AI guidance, not direct medical treatment. Bookings happen on Air Doctor's own platform. Doctors are independent licensed professionals, not employees of Cira. Availability and insurance coverage vary by country and provider.

privacyHub.heroSubtitle: Cira combines advanced medical reasoning with camera-based vitals from a short face scan. The whole system is built so your information stays yours — private, secured, and under your control.
privacyHub.collectTitle: Only what helps you decide what to do next.
privacyHub.collectSubtitle: To give you useful guidance, Cira needs a small, focused set of information. Here's exactly what that looks like.
privacyHub.dontKeepBody: The face scan is a measurement tool, not an identity record. Frames are processed to compute your vitals and then discarded. Nothing is added to a facial database or identity profile.
privacyHub.useSubtitle: Your information powers Cira's guidance in the moment, and — only when you choose — the connection to a real doctor through Air Doctor's global network.
privacyHub.retentionSubtitle: We are finalizing our detailed retention and deletion schedule and will publish it here, rather than over-promising.
privacyHub.contactSubtitle: Privacy is a relationship, not a checkbox. Reach out anytime — we welcome questions and feedback.
privacyHub.securityContactSub: For responsible disclosure of security issues.
privacyHub.privacyContactSub: For data, retention, or deletion questions.
